blended.narrative: Mt. Hood Skibowl is looking at light snowfall over the next 48 hours, with 3.8 inches of wet, heavy snow expected. Snow levels around 4,607 ft. The 14-day outlook shows 6 inches total.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 3.7" of snow, highs of 41°F. Expect wet, heavy snow. Models disagree — check back.

recent_conditions.narrative: 24.0" of new snow in the past 48 hours. Snowpack is building — up 9" over the past week. Current depth: 34".
